description: Hyatt award availability as a scriptable, local, agent-readable CLI.

novel_features.name: Certificate fit finder
novel_features.description: Find available Hyatt award nights that fit a Cat 1-4 or Cat 1-7 certificate before it expires.

novel_features.name: Flexible density matrix
novel_features.description: Show which dates or weeks have the most Hyatt award options across a hotel shortlist.

novel_features.name: Split-stay builder
novel_features.description: Build viable multi-hotel Hyatt itineraries when no one property has the full stay.

novel_features.name: Watch volatility ranking
novel_features.description: Rank watched Hyatt hotels by how often award space opens, closes, or changes price.

novel_features.name: Off-peak opportunity finder
novel_features.description: Find off-peak or unusually low-point Hyatt award clusters across synced calendar data.

novel_features.name: Room-category ladder
novel_features.description: Compare standard, club, and suite award availability side by side for one Hyatt stay window.

novel_features.name: Snapshot coverage audit
novel_features.description: Show stale, missing, or uneven local Hyatt calendar coverage before trusting a scan.
